This '''Anx''' was a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] under the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] had a pet [[Pikobi/Legends|pikobi]].
